acceptance_targets: [CH07-F005] PASS if the revised chapter contains no repeated identical voicemail-status sentence across those three locations and each missed call introduces a distinct new consequence; FAIL if any two beats reuse the same construction and effect.

[CH07-F006] PASS if no more than one "felt...like" construction remains across those cited lines and the replacements deliver concrete perception/action; FAIL if two or more of the original abstraction templates remain.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter contains no repeated identical voicemail-status sentence across those three locations and each missed call introduces a distinct new consequence; FAIL if any two beats reuse the same construction and effect.
findings.problem: Recurring construction exceeds the chapter's repetition tolerance: voicemail refusal is rendered with near-identical sentence shape three-plus times ("The call went to voicemail" / "Straight to voicemail"), flattening escalation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Differentiate the missed-connection beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:92, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:186, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:228 so each refusal changes scene texture or stakes rather than repeating the same sentence-level construction.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than one "felt...like" construction remains across those cited lines and the replacements deliver concrete perception/action; FAIL if two or more of the original abstraction templates remain.
findings.problem: A repeated abstraction formula ("felt...like") appears more than twice at emotional peaks, creating a recognizable prose tic and reducing immediacy.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:29, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:228, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:234, replace at least two "felt...like" comparisons with direct sensory or motor action so stress registers in-body rather than via repeated simile framing.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
